mano_cua.result_summary: 启用Context-Aware Back Buttons后，从Root→Food→Soup逐层导航URL正确更新。但点击|<按钮回到根面板后，页面内容正确显示CBOARD CLASSIC HOME，URL却仍停留在/board/SkEF6D2DaW(Soup)而非/board/root，URL同步失败。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After clicking |< button from SOUP board, the visual content correctly navigated to root board showing CBOARD CLASSIC HOME with all category folders. However the URL remained localhost:3000/board/SkEF6D2DaW (SOUP board ID) instead of updating to localhost:3000/board/root. This confirms the bug: |< button navigates content correctly but fails to update browser URL.
